body: added 8 detectors, posd-lint.toml config, and a /posd-review skill for Claude Code. implemented SCC-based effect propagation to hit full coverage of all 18 "red flags" — detector count is now at 24. wrote 39 new tests; next is figuring out why the findings baseline jumped from 96 to 136.

tied accepted logs to now.text candidates in review.py, superseding old drafts. updated now_updater.py to prioritize log.json over raw commit activity. a bit of a mess in the state logic — need to prune the draft queue next.

removed `evergreenlabs-bot` from skip lists in introduce.py, log_drafter.py, and others. the bot is now a first-class project rather than “invisible” infrastructure. next to see if it can actually introduce itself without breaking things.

init local automation to pull github activity and draft entries via a local llm. canonical data lives in `data/site/*.json` before regenerating `siteData.js`. spent way too long on the prompt—now for the first real run.
Spent a Saturday on a sentiment analyzer for my git commit messages. Works, kind of. Not sure I want to know.
